mapper.sql: id, supplier_id, supplier_class, supplier_name, connect_type, send_class_name, send_method_name, callback_class_name, callback_method_name, is_deleted, create_user, create_time, update_user, update_time, callback_increment_lastid, callback_increment_lasttime, callback_increment_class_name, callback_increment_method_name, warning_mail_to, warning_mail_cc
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.ops_inquiry_adapter_config
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.ops_inquiry_adapter_config (id, supplier_id, supplier_class, supplier_name, connect_type, send_class_name, send_method_name, callback_class_name, callback_method_name, is_deleted, create_user, create_time, update_user, update_time, callback_increment_lastid, callback_increment_lasttime, callback_increment_class_name, callback_increment_method_name, warning_mail_to, warning_mail_cc) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{supplierId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{supplierClass,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{supplierName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{connectType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sendClassName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sendMethodName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{callbackClassName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{callbackMethodName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isDeleted,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{callbackIncrementLastid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{callbackIncrementLasttime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{callbackIncrementClassName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{callbackIncrementMethodName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{warningMailTo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{warningMailCc,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
